summary: The diff shows code modifications to frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts and metadata files, but does not include the actual image files. The BuildRequest requires 13 specific Spider-Verse panel images (panels 7-19) to be added as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated. The code references these images, but the diff shows no image files were added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add 13 regenerated Spider-Verse comic panel images (spiderverse-panel-07.dim_1024x768.png through spiderverse-panel-19.dim_1024x768.png) as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 added files. The actual image files that should be placed in frontend/public/assets/generated are not present in the changes. Only code references to these images were modified in comicData.ts.
